nodes.label: Uriel
nodes.description: A Kohathite ancestor of the prophet Samuel (1 Chr. 6:36).

verses.text: Tahath his son, Uriel his son, Uzziah his son, and Shaul his son.
The son of Elkanah, the son of Joel, the son of Azariah, the son of Zephaniah,
